Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

The .gov means it's official.
Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;

Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

The .gov means it's official.
Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

The .gov means it's official.
Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;

Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:
County Agencies for The Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP)

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

The .gov means it's official.
Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
If you need immediate food assistance, please visit the following resources:

Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania

Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Department of Agriculture
Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture
Overview
The Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture exists to ensure a vibrant economy, a successful future for Pennsylvania agriculture, and to safeguard the public through:
Targeted investments to grow opportunities and remove barriers;
Protecting human, animal, environmental, and plant health through regulatory oversight;
Promotion of and education about Pennsylvania’s agriculture products and sectors;
Conserving farmland and natural resources for the prosperity of Pennsylvania
Need Assistance?
